verification_gate: Learning tasks require source evidence, causal scope, simulation, regression tests, human authority where required, reversible promotion, monitoring, and automatic rollback on failed proof.

clause_1_source_evidence.origin_stage: LIVING-002-A raw event owned by redb transient scratchpad/WAL — the observed failed command / trace that grounds everything downstream; nothing is learned without it
clause_1_source_evidence.witness_binding: LIVING-002-B failure capsule binds the raw event to a SHAKE256 Cryptographic Witness Chain rooted in a verified PostgreSQL source vector; Causal Graph Verification (GNN) rejects a rootless capsule

clause_2_causal_scope.scope_owner: LIVING-002-C causal map owned by PostgreSQL + RuVector (GNN causal edges + causal dependency edges)
clause_2_causal_scope.scope_rule: the causal map is built only from causal edges that already exist in the PostgreSQL knowledge graph; a claim/edge with no historical root is rejected
clause_2_causal_scope.lesson_bounded: LIVING-002-D scoped lesson blast radius equals the stage-C causal edges and no wider; SONA adjusts only from observed successes/failures
clause_2_causal_scope.instinct_inherits_scope: LIVING-002-F instinct inherits the lesson's causal scope and cannot widen it

clause_3_simulation.owner: ATAS (ESN reservoir fixed + trained readout) + PostgreSQL Copy-On-Write staging branches
clause_3_simulation.mechanism: candidate guardrail (E) and instinct (F) are exercised in isolated COW sandboxes and parallel ESN ensembles (up to 100 steps ahead) before any promotion; forecasts (state diffs, resource burn, complexity spikes, failure nodes) are transient sim-only state and never write the baseline

clause_4_regression_tests.in_sandbox: LIVING-002-G runs a regression suite inside the COW sandbox so a branch is confirmed 'mathematically stable and successful' by automated tests before it can be a promotion candidate
clause_4_regression_tests.gate_on_merge: LIVING-002-H requires the regression suite green as an explicit merge gate; a failed regression blocks the merge
clause_4_regression_tests.proof_ledger: regression results are recorded as durable rows in the PostgreSQL proof ledger

clause_5_human_authority_where_required.guardrail_stage: LIVING-002-E — a guardrail is baseline-affecting shared policy, so introducing/changing one is routed through the INTEL-003-M gate stack with LifeOS Mission Control human-in-the-loop confirmation
clause_5_human_authority_where_required.promotion_stage: LIVING-002-H — LifeOS Mission Control provides human-in-the-loop confirmation for baseline-affecting promotions

clause_6_reversible_promotion.guardrail_versioned: LIVING-002-E guardrail rule is versioned in PostgreSQL and can be reverted to the prior version
clause_6_reversible_promotion.promotion_reversible: LIVING-002-H promotion is a COW merge that can be rolled back (COW rollback + PostgreSQL PITR)
clause_6_reversible_promotion.rollback_is_the_reverse: LIVING-002-J rollback is the explicit reversal of promotion
clause_6_reversible_promotion.recovery_source: PostgreSQL PITR + COW rollback of the un-proven merge

monitors: RuVector MinCut real-time immune system (continuous subpolynomial O(n^{o(1)}) dependency-graph monitoring; severs a drifting/hallucinating agent)
LIVING-001 continuous-audit cadence (Daily Pulse / health / drift / provenance) emitting bounded proof
ATAS trajectory monitoring for a run spiralling out of bounds

clause_8_automatic_rollback_on_failed_pr.trigger: LIVING-002-I monitoring detects a failed proof (drift, regression, or failed continued proof)
clause_8_automatic_rollback_on_failed_pr.sim_failure_discard: LIVING-002-G — a failed simulation/regression branch is deterministically discarded before it can ever be promoted
clause_8_automatic_rollback_on_failed_pr.rollback_stage: LIVING-002-J — the promotion is automatically rolled back so the failed world cannot remain the baseline: COW rollback of the merge + PostgreSQL PITR restore to the last proven world
clause_8_automatic_rollback_on_failed_pr.redb_wal_role: subordinate forward-only application-level WAL/outbox during PostgreSQL latency/outage; never a second baseline
clause_8_automatic_rollback_on_failed_pr.verified_cutover_only: a class leaves redb-durable for PostgreSQL only via a green live blobstore_parity.rs cutover under one preserved SHA-256 identity; a failed/unverified cutover is rejected

classes_mapped.transient high-frequency state: STAGE-1 raw event (redb, never durable authority) + STAGE-10 redb WAL
classes_mapped.durable relational macro-state (historie: STAGE-2 durable capsule, STAGE-3 causal map edges, STAGE-5 guardrail rule, STAGE-8/10 trunk, STAGE-9 proof rows (PostgreSQL single durable owner)
classes_mapped.semantic / vector / knowledge-graph stat: STAGE-3 causal map (PostgreSQL + RuVector native extension, No Sidecar)
classes_mapped.per-agent cognition (SONA / MicroLoRA /: STAGE-2 signal, STAGE-4 scoped lesson, STAGE-6 instinct (AgentDB non-authoritative, witnessed by SHAKE256 chains rooted in PostgreSQL)
classes_mapped.derived / disposable staging: STAGE-7 COW branches + ATAS forecasts (never baseline until merged)

invariants_honored: verified cutover only (green live blobstore_parity.rs, one SHA-256 identity)

inputs_reconciled.LIVING-001: STAGE-9 monitoring reuses the LIVING-001 continuous-audit cadence as the proof-producing observation layer
inputs_reconciled.INTEL-003: STAGE-8 reuses the INTEL-003-M explicit gate stack; STAGE-10 reuses the INTEL-003-N proven-world rollback + verified-cutover guard; STAGE-2/4/6 reuse the INTEL-003-K/L failure-capsule and SONA/ATAS primitives
inputs_reconciled.proof_ledger: STAGE-8 regression + STAGE-9 monitoring proofs are durable PostgreSQL rows; a failed proof there arms STAGE-10 automatic rollback

blocked_paths_respected.model_training: none — no adapter, LoRA, or weight is trained (STAGE-4/STAGE-6 define contracts only)
blocked_paths_respected.baseline_promotion: none — STAGE-8 promotion is defined as gated, not executed
blocked_paths_respected.production_mutation: none — STAGE-7 simulation and all stages are planning classification only
blocked_paths_respected.autonomous_policy_change: none — every guardrail/promotion is routed through the explicit gate stack with human authority

proof_summary: LIVING-002 defines the full failure-learning-to-proven-world-promotion chain as an ordered ten-stage pipeline, and generated/task_families/LIVING-002.json assigns each of the ten stages named in the goal exactly once (raw event, failure capsule, causal map, scoped lesson, guardrail, instinct, simulation, promotion, monitoring, rollback = LIVING-002-A..J), each with an owner, lifetime, synchronization edge, recovery source, and explicit relationship to PostgreSQL+RuVector / redb / AgentDB / CodeDB under the settled STORE-001 tiered-authority model. Every one of the eight gate clauses holds with concrete owners: source evidence is anchored at STAGE-1 (redb transient raw event) and made witness-rooted at STAGE-2 (SHAKE256 chain rooted in a verified PostgreSQL source vector, GNN rejection of rootless capsules), propagating through STAGE-3/4/6; causal scope is owned by STAGE-3 (PostgreSQL+RuVector GNN causal edges) and bounds the STAGE-4 scoped lesson and STAGE-6 instinct to exactly the mapped edges and no wider; simulation is STAGE-7 (ATAS ESN ensembles inside isolated PostgreSQL COW staging branches, simulation_required TRUE, failed worlds discarded); regression tests run in-sandbox at STAGE-7 and are a green-required merge gate at STAGE-8, recorded in the PostgreSQL proof ledger; human authority is required at STAGE-5 (guardrail policy) and STAGE-8 (LifeOS Mission Control human-in-the-loop) with autonomous policy change forbidden; reversible promotion holds because the STAGE-5 guardrail is versioned, the STAGE-8 promotion is a COW merge, and STAGE-10 is its explicit reversal; monitoring is STAGE-9 (RuVector MinCut real-time immune system + the LIVING-001 continuous-audit cadence + ATAS trajectory monitoring, observe-only, writing durable proof); and automatic rollback on failed proof is STAGE-10 (COW rollback of the merge + PostgreSQL PITR to the last proven world, with redb serving only as a subordinate forward-only WAL and any redb-durable -> PostgreSQL reclassification gated by a green blobstore_parity.rs SHA-256 cutover), so a failed world can never remain the baseline. The guardrail/instinct split is grounded in the blueprint's passive-shared (durable PostgreSQL rule enforced by MinCut/GNN/witness chains) versus active-per-agent (AgentDB SONA/MicroLoRA/FastGRNN reflex) memory distinction. Inputs are reconciled: STAGE-9 reuses the LIVING-001 cadence, STAGE-8 the INTEL-003-M gate stack, STAGE-10 the INTEL-003-N rollback contract. Every assignment traces to the Architecture Blueprint, the Architecture Context Matrix, STORE-001, or the INTEL-003/LIVING-001 inputs; this is planning classification only in the policy-cell — no model was trained, no baseline promoted, no production state mutated, no policy autonomously changed, and no secret touched.
provenance_derived_from: 1.0_VISION/Notebooklm/Architecture Context Matrix_ PostgreSQL-First LifeOS Framework - Table 1.csv
generated/task_families/INTEL-003.json (failure-capsule learning, gate stack, proven-world rollback)
generated/task_graph.source.csv (LIVING-001 continuous-audit cadence input; LIVING-002 row)
rollback_plan: Restore the archived learning plan; no model, policy, guardrail, or baseline is changed.
